song.title: Arms of Love
song.author: Craig Musseau
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G D Em I sing a simple song of love . C Em D To my Savior, to my Jesus. .G D Em I'm grateful for the things You've done, . C Em D My loving Savior, my precious Jesus.
[V2] .Am Em My heart is glad . D G That You've called me Your own. .Am Em D There's no place I'd rather be . G Bm7 C Than in Your arms of love, . G Bm7 C In Your arms of love, . Em Holding me still, .Bm7 C Holding me near, . D G In Your arms of love.
